display_text: Kez Aghanim's Scepter: Switch Discipline allows casting any weapon ability without triggering the alternate cooldown if used within 3 seconds of Switch Discipline, and refreshes Switch Discipline’s cooldown. This enables rapid ability cycling, making Kez highly adaptable in prolonged engagements and countering ability downtime.
search_text: Kez Aghanim Scepter ability cooldown downtime rapid ability cycling adaptable prolonged engagements

display_text: Kez Aghanim's Shard: Kazurai Katana provides 100% lifesteal from impales and stuns enemies if attacked from behind, with increased max burst stacks. This transforms Kez into a powerful anti-duelist and lane dominator, countering sustain-heavy opponents while adding crowd control for team fights.
search_text: Kez Aghanim Shard lifesteal stun anti-duelist lane dominator sustain crowd control
